title: Melted Optimization
description: Melted Optimization is a lightweight modpack that keeps Minecraft vanilla while boosting FPS, reducing lag spikes and delay, and fixing common bugs for smoother, more stable SMP and PvP gameplay.
body:
# Melted Optimization
This modpack improves Minecraft’s performance without changing the vanilla experience. It smooths FPS, reduces lag spikes, cuts delay, and fixes common bugs—making gameplay feel faster, cleaner, and more stable. Designed mainly for SMP & PvP, it keeps everything lightweight and fully compatible while giving a noticeably smoother experience. 

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.20.6 - 1.21.8
- Other versions: Not tested 

## Credits
- Modpack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
- All performance and utility mods were created by their original developers; full credit goes to them for their work.
